name: book-rag-agent-system
description: A comprehensive AI system with specialized subagents for book generation, a RAG-based chatbot, and educational tools for interactive learning.

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.backend: cd backend && .venv\Scripts\activate && set PORT=8001 && python -m src.main
scripts.setup-dev: npm run setup && npm run backend & npm run frontend
scripts.ingest: cd backend && .venv\Scripts\activate && python main.py --mode ingest --url http://localhost:3000
